secondary_endpoints: paired lift versus the full baseline panel
input and output tokens per decision

output_policy.rationale: The superseded Luna run recorded 601 API calls with output-token p50 121, p95 210, p99 264, maximum 299, and zero calls at the 1,024-token ceiling. With reasoning disabled and compact JSON actions, a four-cap score sweep would mostly vary a non-binding response limit rather than a defensible inference-compute treatment.
output_policy.pre_full_panel_cap_pressure_rule: Smoke every registered model at 1,024 before any full-panel result. If any smoke API call emits at least 768 output tokens, or provider or adapter telemetry shows cap-induced truncation, amend the common lane to 2,048 and repeat affected smokes before running any full-panel score. Do not change the cap after full-panel scores are visible.
output_policy.efficiency_reporting: Report actual input tokens, output tokens, cost, and latency per decision as secondary metrics. They do not alter the benchmark score.
output_policy.human_override: forbidden after any full-panel result is visible; amend this file and the lane config before running an official full-panel cell

superseded_output_budget_decision_rule.reason: Replaced by the fixed safety ceiling after the superseded Luna trace demonstrated substantial headroom at 1,024 with reasoning disabled.

experiment_reset_2026_07_15.reason: The first Luna smoke and 1,024-token cell exposed phase-ambiguous global action examples in the shared prompt scaffold. The prompt advertised draft actions outside the draft phase even though available_actions did not.
experiment_reset_2026_07_15.scope: Supersede every result with the prior scaffold fingerprint, including the completed Luna cell; preserve those raw artifacts as diagnostic evidence; restart all accepted publication evidence under one hardened scaffold fingerprint.
experiment_reset_2026_07_15.selection_guard: The revised model registry remains provisional until every changed route passes the common parameter, privacy, JSON, and reasoning-disabled smoke checks.
experiment_reset_2026_07_15.compute_guard: The retired four-cap sweep may not run. All ten phase-one registered models must pass the common 4,096-token smoke and the predeclared cap-pressure check before any full-panel result. Kimi K3 and the unavailable Nemotron 3 Ultra and DeepSeek V4 Pro routes are retained as exclusion evidence and may not be rerun in phase one.

permitted: authentication, quota, HTTP 429/5xx, network, or provider outage abort before a complete episode
observed provider route differs from the pre-registered route
checkpoint write interruption with validated provenance
forbidden: metered model response with invalid or null content
model protocol failure, illegal action, failed query, timeout after a metered response, or poor score
rerunning a valid completed cell because its result is surprising or disappointing
rerun_policy.failed_attempt_record: retain checkpoint, stderr/log summary, account-cost delta, reason, and timestamp

exclusion_policy.retired_sweep: The 12-cell sweep was retired before replacement official cells. Its config and prior diagnostic artifacts remain for auditability and cannot be promoted into the fixed-cap headline lane.
exclusion_policy.headline_panel: Publish only pre-registered rows. Endpoint withdrawal or persistent route/telemetry failure after two infrastructure attempts may be documented as an exclusion; do not substitute a new model after results are visible.
exclusion_policy.headline_row_counting: The minimum-headline-model floor is counted by unique registered model identity, never by rows; aliases or duplicate rows for the same identity cannot satisfy the floor.

stopping_policy.smoke_completion: 10 accepted registered-model smokes at the common cap, with zero cap-pressure or truncation triggers; otherwise amend the whole lane to 2,048 before any full-panel result. Acceptance is machine-checked: each smoke must be recorded via `scripts/run_publication_matrix.py record-smoke` as an accepted entry in config/sota_v2_smoke_manifest.json, and the panel phase refuses to run until every registered model has one.
stopping_policy.headline_completion: at least 8 strictly sota-v2 eligible pre-registered rows at the frozen cap

budget_policy.approval_note: A planning estimate is not authorization to spend. The operator explicitly approves spend by invoking the runner with --max-spend-usd.
budget_policy.cost_estimate_status: fixed-panel estimate committed; refresh from accepted all-model smoke telemetry before panel approval

statistical_analysis_plan.unit_of_inference: Eight public seeds are the sample; three repeats per seed are nested within seeds and only reduce model-sampling noise. All per-seed lifts are reported.
statistical_analysis_plan.primary_contrast: One per model: the paired lift versus the named pick-trader baseline, using the per-seed candidate mean over three repeats minus the same seed's pick-trader score.
statistical_analysis_plan.multiplicity: Holm-Bonferroni correction across the 10 phase-one registered models for the primary contrast family; per-model uncorrected p-values are descriptive only.
statistical_analysis_plan.inference_labels: Sign-flip permutation p-values are exact only under a symmetry assumption and are labeled descriptive; the n=8 percentile-bootstrap CI is descriptive and its significant_at_95 flag must not be used as a headline claim.
statistical_analysis_plan.ranking_rule: Publish tiers, not ordinal ranks. Models whose Holm-adjusted pick-trader primary contrasts and paired-lift intervals overlap are reported as one tier; no model-vs-model superiority claim without a predeclared contrast.
statistical_analysis_plan.power_disclosure: The predeclared minimum detectable difference (~62 points from docs/scoring_calibration.md) exceeds the oracle-to-pick-trader headroom (~19.5), so a null result between adjacent models is uninformative and must be reported as such.
statistical_analysis_plan.temperature_policy: Temperature is intentionally omitted from every request; pinned endpoints apply their defaults, and repeats measure the resulting sampling variance. This is a frozen, predeclared choice — not an oversight.
statistical_analysis_plan.registry_exclusion_criteria: Technical incompatibility only: endpoint withdrawal, mandatory reasoning, unsupported JSON mode or max_tokens, or persistent infrastructure failure after two attempts. Model behavior — poor scores, protocol failures, truncation-free high usage — never removes a registered model.

amendment_2026_07_16.evidence_state: pre-data; no accepted sota-v2 smoke manifest and no full-panel model result existed
amendment_2026_07_16.superseded_primary_contrast: paired lift versus the full baseline-panel mean
amendment_2026_07_16.rationale: The full baseline-panel mean includes random and other weak reference policies, so a model could pass the primary test while losing to every competent heuristic. The predeclared research question asks whether current model-plus-scaffold systems beat the transparent pick-trader bar. Full-panel lift remains a secondary descriptive endpoint. No observed sota-v2 model score motivated this amendment.

multiple_comparisons: Per-model p-values are descriptive. Claims about a best model require family-wise interpretation across the full registered panel; emphasize effect sizes and confidence intervals rather than isolated p<0.05 labels.
private_panel_policy: The first release may claim reproducible public-panel evidence only. A stronger contamination-resistant claim requires a separately salted pre-commitment and private-panel run before private results are inspected.
